mapper.select: SELECT USER_ID , USER_CIF_NO , CI_INFO , USER_NM , USER_SEQ_NO , IB_CLOSE_YN , TO_CHAR(UPDATETIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATETIME , TO_CHAR(REGISTTIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REGISTTIME FROM MA3_OPEN_BANK_USER_MGT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_CIF_NO = #{userCifNo} AND IB_CLOSE_YN = #{ibCloseYn} WITH UR

SELECT USER_ID , USER_CIF_NO , FINTECH_USE_NUM , PAYER_NUM , FCODE , BANK_CD , ACCT_NO , ACCT_NM , ACCT_COMMENT , AGR_STS , TO_CHAR(AGR_DATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS AGR_DATE , TO_CHAR(UPDATETIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS UPDATETIME , TO_CHAR(REGISTTIME, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS') AS REGISTTIME FROM MA3_OPEN_BANK_ACCT_MGT WHERE USER_ID = #{userId} AND USER_CIF_NO = #{userCifNo} ORDER BY BANK_CD, REGISTTIME WITH UR
